mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, user_id, role, content, model_name, can_answer, confidence, transfer_suggested, transfer_reason, created_at FROM ai_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND role = 'ASSISTANT' ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket ( id, ticket_no, title, description, status, priority, ai_priority_suggestion, category_id, department_id, creator_id, assignee_id, source, source_session_id, source_message_id, ai_summary, ai_suggestion, transfer_reason, deadline_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{ticketNo}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{aiPrioritySuggestion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{departmentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{creatorId}, #{assigneeId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{source}, #{sourceSessionId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{sourceMessageId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{aiSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aiSuggestion,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{transferReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deadlineAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ticket WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM ticket WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM ticket WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM ticket WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM ticket WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT id, ticket_id, from_status, to_status, action, operator_id, operator_role, comment_text, created_at FROM ticket_flow_log WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET status = #{status}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, first_resolved_at = COALESCE(first_resolved_at, #{firstResolvedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}), closed_at = #{closedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, reopen_count = reopen_count + #{incrementReopen,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{ticketId} AND deleted = 0
